export default "+ :👋 Accueil\n    + R1-13:Prise en main des outils informatiques\n- sec:🔒 Sécurité\n    - R2-14:S2 Administration Système Linux\n        + CM:CM\n            - CM1:CM1 - Commandes Shell\n            - CM2:CM2 - Les fichiers\n        + Slides:Slides\n            - CM1:CM1 - Commandes Shell\n            - CM2:CM2 - Les fichiers\n        + TP:TP\n            - TP1:TP1\n            - TP2:TP2\n        - cheat:Cheat Sheet\n        + DS:DS\n            - cur:2024-2025\n    + R3-13:S3 Identité Numérique\n        + CM:CM\n            - CM1:CM1\n        + DS:DS\n            - cur:2024-2024\n    + R4-10:S4 Réseaux et Sécurité Web\n        + CM:CM\n            - CM1:CM1\n        + DS:DS\n            - cur:cur\n    + SAE6-05:S6 [SAÉ] Pentest, Hacking, et Renforcement\n- dev:🖳 Développement\n    + R4-01-VCOD:S4 Automatisation et Tests en Programmation\n        + CM:CM\n            - CM1:CM1\n        + DS:DS\n            - cur:cur\n    - R5-06-VCOD:S5-VCOD Developpement Logiciel\n        + CM:CM\n            - CM1:CM1 - Analyse\n            - CM2:CM2 - Conception\n            - CM3:CM3 - Implémentation\n        + DS:DS\n            - cur:2024-2024\n    + R6-X:S6 Programmation Orientée Données\n        - CM:CM\n--\n- tools:🛠 Outils\n    - https://github.com/denis-migdal/Linux-VM-Installer:LVMI\n- bib:📚 Bibliothèques\n    - https://liss.migdal.ovh/:LISS\n    - https://vshs.migdal.ovh/:VSHS\n    - https://chartshtml.migdal.ovh/:ChartsHTML\n--\n- bdd:⛁ Bases de données (old)\n    - R1-01:Tableur et Reporting\n        + CM:CM\n            - CM1:CM1\n            - CM2:CM2\n        + TP:TP\n            - TP1:TP1\n            - TP2:TP2\n    - R1-02:Bases de Données Relationnelles 1\n        + CM:CM\n            - CM1:CM1\n            - CM2:CM2\n            - CM3:CM3\n            - CM4:CM4\n        + Slides:Slides\n            - CM1:CM1\n            - CM2:CM2\n            - CM3:CM3\n            - CM4:CM4\n        + TD:TD\n            - TD1:TD1\n            - TD2:TD2\n            - TD3:TD3\n            - TD4:TD4\n        + TP:TP\n            - TP1:TP1\n            - TP2:TP2\n            - TP3:TP3\n            - TP4:TP4\n            - TP5:TP5\n        - cheat:Cheat Sheet\n        + DS:DS\n- web:🌐 Web (old)\n    - R3-03:S3 Technologies Web\n        + CM:CM\n            - CM1:I. HTML5\n            - CM2:II. CSS3\n            - CM3:III. Code côté client\n            - CM4:IV. Architecture client/serveur\n            - CM5:V. Formulaires ?\n        + TP:TP\n            - TP1:TP1\n            - TP2:TP2\n            - TP3-4:TP3-4\n        - cheat-html5:Cheat sheet HTML5\n        - cheat-css3:Cheat sheet CSS3\n    - R4-09-VCOD:S4 Programmation Web\n        + CM:CM\n            - CM1:CM1\n        + DS:DS\n            - cur:cur\n    + SAE4-02-VCOD:S4 [SAÉ] Collecte Automatisée de données Web\n    - R5-07-VCOD:S5-VCOD Programmation Web pour la Visualisation\n        + CM:CM\n            - CM1:CM1\n        + DS:DS\n            - cur:2024-2024";
